title: Classic Star Wars Volume 3: Escape to Hoth
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Vol. 3}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:CSWVol3-EscapeToHoth.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars Volume 3:
Escape to Hoth'' |writer=[[Archie Goodwin]] |penciller=[[Al Williamson]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Steve Buccellato]], [[Matt Hollingsworth]], [[Ray Murtaugh]], [[Tom Roberts]] |cover artist=[[Al Williamson]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[January]] [[1996]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/44-431/Classic-Star-Wars-Vol-3-Escape-to-Hoth-TPB|text=Classic Star Wars, Vol. 3: Escape to Hoth TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=208 |isbn=1569710937 |isbn2= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0]] & [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] |series=''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' |issues=3 |preceded by=''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm]]'' |followed by= }} '''''Classic Star Wars Volume 3: Escape to Hoth''''' was the third trade paperback collection of issues from the ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]]. ''Escape to Hoth'' collects ''Classic Star Wars'' issues 15-20. It was published in [[January]] [[1996]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''After the initial euphoria of the Rebel Alliance's first major success – the destruction of the dreaded Imperial battle station known as the Death Star – the Empire began to rally. It had been staggered, but not destroyed. Even Darth Vader still lived. And he sought to avenge himself upon the still-ragtag forces of the Rebel Alliance. This is the story of how Luke, Leia, Han, Chewbacca, and the droids graduated from the triumphal reception at the conclusion of Star Wars: A New Hope to their new lives as hardbitten guerrillas fighting against the tyrannies of a still-dangerous Empire in ''The Empire Strikes Back''''. ==Contents== *[[Classic Star Wars 15|''Classic Star Wars'' 15]] *''[[Classic Star Wars 16]]'' *[[Classic Star Wars 17|''Classic Star Wars'' 17]] *[[Classic Star Wars 18|''Classic Star Wars'' 18]] *[[Classic Star Wars 19|''Classic Star Wars'' 19]] *[[Classic Star Wars 20|''Classic Star Wars'' 20]] ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:CSWv3EtH-LEC.png|Cover art File:CSWVol3-EscapeToHoth.png|Dark Horse cover ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/44-431/Classic-Star-Wars-Vol-3-Escape-to-Hoth-TPB|text=Classic Star Wars, Vol. 3: Escape to Hoth TPB}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები, ტომი 3: გაქცევა ჰოთზე |nl=Classic Star Wars Volume 3: Escape to Hoth }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars trade paperbacks]]
